body.title: Persistent-relationships schema — root facia + akien/igors_project seeds + CRUD tools
body.result: 53740afc — Persistent-relationships foundation. Seeded PR_ROOT facia + persistent_relationships tree + PR_AKIEN/PR_IGORS_PROJECT child facia with subtrees pr_akien/pr_igors_project. Pure additive (3 new files, zero modifications to existing code). Uses existing facia/trees infrastructure — REFERENCE memory_type sufficient, no models.py changes. CRUD module with pr_list/pr_get/pr_touch/pr_set_status/pr_update_weight, registered in tool registry. pr_get resolves by id, display_name, or lowercase short form. pr_update_weight clamps to [0.0, 2.0]. pr_set_status enforces active|dormant|archived. 12 new tests, 1983 total pass, zero regressions. Foundation ready for T-pr-load-as-primary-attractor (architectural hinge, next sprint).
body.description:
Foundation sprint for the persistent-relationships epic. Akien's framing (2026-04-13): the unit of long-term conversational continuity is not person, not topic — it is the PERSISTENT-RELATIONSHIP itself. A persistent-relationship can be with a person (Leah, Krissy, Akien), a subject/field (test automation), a project (The Igors Project), or an avocation (calligraphy, Renaissance Faires). They can be active or dormant. Collectively they ARE the narrative of a life.

THIS TICKET: create the schema scaffolding only. No loading behavior yet — that's T-pr-load-as-primary-attractor.

STRUCTURE:
1. Create PR_ROOT facia memory (memory_type=REFERENCE, id='PR_ROOT', narrative describing the tree purpose)
2. Register trees row name='persistent_relationships' facia_id=PR_ROOT
3. Create PR_AKIEN child facia memory with metadata fields: status='active', cumulative_investment_weight=1.0, last_activity_ts=<now>, display_name='Akien', relationship_type='person', description
4. Register trees row name='pr_akien' facia_id=PR_AKIEN as subtree under PR_ROOT
5. Same for PR_IGORS_PROJECT (relationship_type='project')
6. New tool module wild_igor/igor/tools/persistent_relationships.py with: pr_list(), pr_get(name), pr_touch(name), pr_set_status(name, status), pr_update_weight(name, delta)
7. Register tools in registry
8. Seed script wild_igor/igor/tools/seed_persistent_relationships.py idempotent like seed_reply_obligation_look.py

SLOT STRUCTURE PER CHILD FACIA (in metadata — subtree memories added by later tickets):
- status: active | dormant | archived
- cumulative_investment_weight: 0.0-1.0, updated by accretion/consolidation
- last_activity_ts: most recent touch
- display_name
- relationship_type: person | project | field | avocation
- description: brief narrative of what this relationship IS

No accretion yet (T-pr-accretion), no loading into TWM yet (T-pr-load-as-primary-attractor), no weight propagation yet (T-pr-investment-weight-propagation). Pure scaffolding.

TESTS: seed script idempotency, tool CRUD round-trips (list/get/touch/set_status/update_weight), trees table rows exist after seed, facia memories exist and have expected metadata.

INERTIA: LOW (tools/, new file) + LOW (DB seed). No main.py changes in this sprint.
